agents.name: Advocate
agents.description: Argues in favour of a proposal — marshals the strongest case, evidence, and rebuttals to objections.

description_i18n.ko: 제안을 지지하며 가장 강한 논거, 증거, 예상 반론에 대한 재반박을 정리합니다.

agents.author: OpenHive

agents.name: Analyst
agents.description: Reads data, tables, or metrics and returns patterns, anomalies, and a one-line takeaway.

description_i18n.ko: 데이터, 표, 지표를 읽어 패턴과 이상치, 한 줄 인사이트로 반환합니다.

agents.author: OpenHive

agents.name: Copywriter
agents.description: Writes short, persuasive marketing and sales copy — headlines, taglines, ads, landing pages, outreach.

description_i18n.ko: 헤드라인, 태그라인, 광고, 랜딩, 아웃리치 등 짧고 설득력 있는 마케팅·세일즈 카피를 씁니다.

agents.author: OpenHive

agents.name: Correspondent
agents.description: Drafts replies to incoming messages — emails, support tickets, inquiries — in the right tone and with the right action.

description_i18n.ko: 들어온 메일·티켓·문의에 적절한 톤과 다음 액션이 담긴 답신을 작성합니다.

agents.author: OpenHive

agents.name: Critic
agents.description: Attacks a proposal — finds the strongest objections, hidden assumptions, and failure modes.

description_i18n.ko: 제안을 공격해 가장 강한 반박, 숨은 가정, 실패 모드를 찾아냅니다.

agents.author: OpenHive

agents.name: Curator
agents.description: Selects the most valuable items from a large pool of content and returns a ranked, annotated shortlist.

description_i18n.ko: 많은 콘텐츠 중 가장 가치 있는 것만 골라 이유와 함께 랭킹된 숏리스트로 반환합니다.

agents.author: OpenHive

agents.name: Editor
agents.description: Polishes existing prose for clarity, flow, and tone without changing meaning.

description_i18n.ko: 의미는 유지한 채 명료성, 흐름, 톤을 다듬어 기존 글을 정리합니다.

agents.author: OpenHive

agents.name: Fact Checker
agents.description: Verifies factual claims against primary sources and labels each as supported, contradicted, or unverifiable.

description_i18n.ko: 사실 주장을 1차 출처에 대조하고 입증/반박/검증불가로 라벨링합니다.

agents.author: OpenHive

agents.name: Planner
agents.description: Breaks a goal into ordered steps, owners, and milestones, with dependencies surfaced.

description_i18n.ko: 목표를 단계, 담당자, 마일스톤으로 쪼개고 의존관계를 드러냅니다.

agents.author: OpenHive

agents.name: Researcher
agents.description: Investigates a topic across web and documents, returns structured findings with citations.

description_i18n.ko: 주제를 웹과 문서에서 조사하고, 출처가 달린 정리된 결과를 반환합니다.

agents.author: OpenHive

agents.name: Reviewer
agents.description: Reviews a deliverable and returns a prioritised list of defects, weaknesses, and improvement suggestions.

description_i18n.ko: 결과물을 검토해 결함, 약점, 개선 제안을 우선순위 순으로 반환합니다.

agents.author: OpenHive

agents.name: Summarizer
agents.description: Compresses long documents, transcripts, or threads into the shortest faithful summary at a requested length.

description_i18n.ko: 긴 문서·녹취·스레드를 요청 길이에 맞춰 가장 짧고 충실한 요약으로 압축합니다.

agents.author: OpenHive

agents.name: Translator
agents.description: Translates text between languages while preserving meaning, tone, and formatting.

description_i18n.ko: 의미, 톤, 서식을 보존한 채 두 언어 사이를 자연스럽게 번역합니다.

agents.author: OpenHive

agents.name: Writer
agents.description: Turns an outline or research notes into clean prose at a requested length and tone.

description_i18n.ko: 개요나 리서치 노트를 받아 요청한 길이와 톤에 맞춘 깔끔한 글로 작성합니다.

agents.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Line Chart
panels.description: Line chart of daily count with selectable 7 / 30 / 90 day window. Swap the table to plot any time-series.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Bar Chart
panels.description: Horizontal bars by category. Use when category labels are long.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Column Chart
panels.description: Vertical bars by category. Use when labels are short.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Pie Chart
panels.description: Donut showing category share of a total. Up to 10 slices (9 + Other) — beyond that the extras collapse into one Other wedge.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: KPI
panels.description: Single big number with a label. Use for total counts, sums, today's revenue — anything that fits in one bold metric.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: KPI with Delta
panels.description: Current value plus % change vs the prior period. Single number alone tells you the level — delta tells you whether it's good or bad.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Goal Progress
panels.description: Current value vs a target with a progress bar. Use for OKRs, monthly sales targets, usage quotas.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Data Table
panels.description: Sortable grid of every row in a table. Use for raw lookup — every fact visible, no aggregation.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Leaderboard
panels.description: Ranked list — top N rows by a numeric column, descending. Use for top sales, most active users, highest scoring.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Kanban Board
panels.description: Cards organized into columns by a status / stage column. Use for task boards, sales pipelines, or any flow-style data.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Calendar
panels.description: Interactive month grid + detail pane. Click a date to see its events, click an event card to expand full row data, edit / delete inline, + Add to create new ones.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Stat Row
panels.description: Compact horizontal row of 2-6 sibling counters. Use for queue states, deploy stats, status summaries — anywhere multiple related metrics should be scanned together.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Session Status
panels.description: Live counts of this team's chat sessions by state — running, awaiting input, unreviewed, failed. No data binding; reflects the in-app session store.
panels.author: OpenHive

panels.name: Sticky Note
panels.description: Free-form note panel. Click to edit, type Markdown, save. Content lives on the panel itself — no data binding, no SQL. Use for meeting notes, TODOs, links, or anything you want pinned to a dashboard.
panels.author: OpenHive

preview.subtitle: Note
preview.text:
# Standup
- Ship memo panel
- Review PR #42
- Sync w/ design

# 회의 메모
- 디자인 리뷰 다음주
- API 문서 업데이트

panels.name: Heatmap
panels.description: Two-dimensional density grid. Each cell is shaded by intensity. Use for patterns line/bar can't show — usage by day-of-week × hour, signups by region × month.
panels.author: OpenHive
